history.content:
<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, and moving forward brings me closer to the open area leading toward the goal O. I should advance rather than turn.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I need to change direction to avoid the lava and look for a safe path toward the goal, which is visible ahead and slightly to the right. Turning left will let me inspect a safe adjacent direction next.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, while the left and right visible floor cells are safe. Since I need to explore toward the goal and avoid walls, the safest immediate move is to go forward into the unknown space.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, so moving forward is not guaranteed safe. The immediate left and right nearby are floor cells, but since the goal is not visible and I need to explore safely, turning right will let me reorient and inspect/open up the map without stepping into uncertainty.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safest immediate step is to turn so I can find a safe path around the lava and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly in front of me is unknown, but the visible safe openings are to my left and right on the same row. Since I need to explore safely and cannot infer the goal yet, I will turn left to face west and check that corridor next.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing West. The cell directly ahead is a lava cell, so moving forward would be fatal. To make progress safely, I should change direction. Turning left will face me South, which is likely a safe way to navigate around the blockage.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing south. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell, while the goal is visible nearby but blocked by lava, so I should continue moving through the open path rather than turning into danger. I will move forward into the free cell below me.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
